programme.title: Snooki & Jwoww: Che Drag!
programme.desc: I cani di Jwoww affrontano gli esami finali per diventare cani da supporto. Snooki riceve il risultato del test del DNA. Mentre si festeggia un drag-party con i Joeys, i ragazzi vanno a pescare.

programme.title: Snooki & Jwoww: Weekend di coppia
programme.desc: Snooki e Jwoww decidono di organizzare un week-end per coppie con i loro vecchi amici del Jersey Shore Ron, Sam e Deena

programme.title: Snooki & Jwoww: Il mio bambino sta diventano grande!
programme.sub-title: Il mio bambino sta diventano grande!
programme.desc: L'estate sta finendo e Snooki e Jwoww organizzano una festa dei pirati per Lorenzo.Durante la sessione finale della terapia, Roger vuole sapere qual è la posizione di Jwoww sul matrimonio

programme.title: Pauly D: Da Jersey Shore A Las Vegas: Che Stress Essere Pauly D!
programme.desc: Pauly D. ha una possibilita’ unica, fare un provino a Las Vegas! I suoi amici d’infanzia lo accompagnano nel viaggio.

programme.title: Pauly D: Da Jersey Shore A Las Vegas: La Vita In Suite
programme.desc: I Ragazzi arrivano a Las Vegas e Ryan mette subito a repentaglio la permanenza di Pauly D.

programme.title: Pauly D: Da Jersey Shore A Las Vegas: Cose Da Pazzi
programme.desc: Pauly D. si chiede se riuscirà mai a trovare il vero amore.

programme.title: Pauly D: Da Jersey Shore A Las Vegas: La Scelta Dell'anello
programme.desc: Pauly D. è coinvolto con una donna sposata, mentre Biggie vuole fare “la proposta” a Mary Jane.

programme.title: Pauly D: Da Jersey Shore A Las Vegas: Sono Arrivate Le Truppe!
programme.desc: Pauly D. deve esibirsi in una base militare e I Ragazzi devono armarsi di coraggio per allenarsi con le truppe!

programme.title: Pauly D: Da Jersey Shore A Las Vegas: Casa Dolce Casa
programme.desc: Quando i ragazzi rientrano in citta’, Pauly D. va a trovare la sua ex, Biggie va alla ricerca delle fedi nuziali e Jerry ha un appuntamento “hot”.

programme.title: Pauly D: Da Jersey Shore A Las Vegas: Spiriti E Angeli
programme.desc: I Ragazzi vogliono portare Biggie in uno strip club. Angel arriva a sorpresa a Las Vegas, mentre Pauly D. deve misurarsi con una dura prova, fare il DJ al Rain Night Club.

programme.title: Pauly D: Da Jersey Shore A Las Vegas
programme.desc: Ryan fa bere Pauly durante il suo DJ set. Angel vive il momento più bello della sua vita a Las Vegas!

programme.title: Pauly D: Da Jersey Shore A Las Vegas: Una Buona Impressione
programme.desc: Biggie ha già l'anello pronto, ora deve chiedere ai genitori di MJ il permesso di sposarla. Pauly viene invitato al Planet Hollywood.

programme.title: Pauly D: Da Jersey Shore A Las Vegas: Cents And The City
programme.desc: Pauly ha un incontro con la casa discografica di 50 Cent, ma il momento viene rovinato dai problemi causati da Ryan. Pauly riceve poi una chiamata per esibirsi a un grande concerto.

programme.title: Pauly D: Da Jersey Shore A Las Vegas: Dive, Diamanti E...
programme.desc: I ragazzi vanno a Puerto Rico. Pauly si esibisce aprendo il concerto di Britney Spears.

programme.title: Pauly D: Da Jersey Shore A Las Vegas: Pauly D E' Stato Qui
programme.desc: Nell'ultima notte a Puerto Rico, Biggie fa la proposta a Mary Jane. Nel Rhode Island Pauly pensa al suo futuro e si esibisce a sorpresa a un ballo del suo vecchio liceo.

programme.title: Snooki & Jwoww: Scusate vicini, stanno arrivando le stronzette
programme.sub-title: Scusate vicini, stanno arrivando le stronzette
programme.desc: Snooki e Jwoww decidono di andare a vivere insieme prima che le loro relazioni diventino troppo serie. Snooki però ha un paio di scheletri nell'armadio che capovolgeranno la situazione.

programme.title: Snooki & Jwoww: In cosa mi sono cacciata?
programme.desc: Nonostante Snooki sia fidanzata e incinta, lei e Jwoww vanno comunque a vivere insieme. Quando Jionni e Roger le vanno a trovare per la prima volta, scoppia una rissa alla festa di laurea.

programme.title: Snooki & Jwoww: Sembra una Mini-polpetta!

programme.title: Snooki & Jwoww: Indovina chi viene a cena
programme.desc: Snooki e Jwoww invitano a cena le loro compagne di stanza di Jersey Shore così Snooki può rivelare le grandi novità. Un rozzo tuttofare, però, rischia di mandare tutto all'aria.

programme.title: Snooki & Jwoww: Una festa sobria
programme.desc: Le ragazze di Jersey Shore rimproverano Snooki per via del fatto che è incinta e fidanzata. Jwoww e Snooki organizzano una festa di inaugurazione della nuova casa per parenti ed amici.

programme.title: Snooki & Jwoww: Ormoni calmatevi!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Redescubriendo el T-Rex
programme.desc: Chris Packham investiga los misterios que envuelven al Tyrannosaurus Rex. Rompemos los mitos sobre su apariencia, su forma de moverse o cómo socializaba, de la mano de diferentes expertos internacionales.

programme.title: El legado celta
programme.desc: Retrocedemos en la historia a la época megalítica y mostramos la evolución de los primeros pobladores gallegos. Observamos cómo, a pesar de ser absorbidos por el imperio romano, su singularidad perduró en el tiempo.

programme.title: La guerrera vikinga
programme.desc: En 1878, un grupo de arqueólogos que exploraba la isla de Björkö, en Suecia, descubrió una tumba vikinga. En ella estaba el esqueleto de una mujer, numerosos artefactos, una espada, una lanza, flechas y los restos de dos caballos sacrificados.

programme.title: Constructores de castillos
programme.desc: Una mirada a los castillos, bastiones defensivos, residencias y símbolos de poder que dominaron la vida medieval europea.

programme.title: Constructores de castillos
programme.desc: Cómo resistieron los castillos los ataques para los que fueron construidos, incluido uno de los asedios más sangrientos de Inglaterra.

programme.title: Constructores de castillos
programme.desc: Los castillos dejaron de ser fortalezas a prueba de asedios y se convirtieron en lugares de ceremonia y fantasía. El castillo de Windsor, reconstruido, es un ejemplo notable.

programme.title: Construcciones extremas
programme.sub-title: Meraviglia, el gigante de los mares
programme.desc: El Meraviglia es lo último en cruceros. Tiene 315 metros de eslora, un peso de ochenta mil toneladas y una capacidad para más de siete mil personas.

programme.title: Construcciones extremas
programme.desc: Con un desplazamiento de 21.500 toneladas, el Tonnerre es el mayor buque de la Armada francesa después del portaaviones Charles de Gaulle. Este buque de aspecto futurista es una auténtica navaja suiza del mar.

programme.title: Construcciones extremas
programme.desc: El mastodóntico proyecto de ampliación del canal de Suez consiguió doblar la anchura original y dotar de mayor profundidad a su vía principal.

programme.title: Los líderes del nazismo
programme.desc: Hans Frank fue un político y abogado alemán que se desempeñó como jefe del Gobierno General en Polonia durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial. Frank fue uno de los primeros miembros del Partido Alemán de los Trabajadores, el precursor del Partido Nazi.

programme.title: Los líderes del nazismo
programme.desc: Wilhelm Canaris fue almirante alemán y jefe de la Abwehr, el servicio de inteligencia militar alemán. Como jefe de espías, Wilhem, organizó operaciones que acabaron provocando caos y destrucción.

programme.title: Los líderes del nazismo
programme.desc: Benito Mussolini, el dictador cuyo brutal camino al poder marcó la pauta para el surgimiento del nazismo. Fue Primer Ministro de Italia desde la toma del poder por parte de los fascistas hasta 1943, y Duce desde 1919 hasta su ejecución en 1945.

programme.title: Construcciones extremas
programme.sub-title: Meraviglia, el gigante de los mares
programme.desc: El Meraviglia es lo último en cruceros. Tiene 315 metros de eslora, un peso de ochenta mil toneladas y una capacidad para más de siete mil personas.

programme.title: Construcciones extremas
programme.desc: Con un desplazamiento de 21.500 toneladas, el Tonnerre es el mayor buque de la Armada francesa después del portaaviones Charles de Gaulle. Este buque de aspecto futurista es una auténtica navaja suiza del mar.

programme.title: Construcciones extremas

programme.title: Construcciones extremas
programme.desc: El mastodóntico proyecto de ampliación del canal de Suez consiguió doblar la anchura original y dotar de mayor profundidad a su vía principal.

programme.title: Actualidad 360
programme.desc: Actualidad 360 es un canal de noticias 24 horas que, de la mano de las agencias y medios de comunicación líderes en España, ofrece una visión plural sobre la actualidad más relevante a nivel nacional e internacional.

programme.title: Relic Hunter

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Myth of the Maze
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Claudia visit Athens, Greece to search the Minotaur's maze for the legendary golden twine.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Afterlife and Death
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Cairo, Egypt and then Amsterdam. They must beat rival relic hunter Avery Ko to the Pharaoh Thutmose's diamond before it is cut up and sold.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Etched in Stone
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Stewie Harper head to Stockholm, Sweden to find the Runestone of King Jann I of Norway.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Dublin, Ireland in search of the missing crown of the last King of Ireland.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Vanishing Art
programme.desc: Accompanying Max the magician, Sydney and Nigel journey to Atlantic City, New Jersey in search of Hungary's lost and allegedly cursed Royal Scepter.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Love Letter
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to France to look for the lost wedding vows of Josephine Pontoise and Guy de Bourdin, which would prove their heir is the rightful owner of St. Agnes Sur-Loire.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Good Year
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to France to find the lost stones from Marie Antoinette's Crown.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nothing But the Truth
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are reunited with Stewie Harper in the search for the Chalice of Truth in France.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Paris, France after the Sword of Jacques de Molay, Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Rival relic hunter Rita Rosellini is also after the sword.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Possessed
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Brussels, Belgium in search of the sacred sundial of Zeus in order to stop the Vampires.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Memories of Montmartre
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Paris, France to find a stolen locket, so they can clear Sydney's dead grandmother of the charges.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Put Back
programme.desc: Kuba, Africa 100 AD: Worshippers of Woote curse his idol to protect it. 2000: Ross Crawford comes to Sydney, because he took the idol and the curse has accelerated his aging.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Legend of the Lost
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel set out to find if the legend of the lost civilization in New Guinea is actually true. Unfortunately, they have to team up with Derek Lloyd.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Dagger of Death
programme.desc: India, 500 A.D.: A precious dagger is used in human sacrifices to goddess Kali. Sydney must return a relic to India for her fellow hunter, who believes the dagger made him kill his assistant.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Last of the Mochicas
programme.desc: On a search for a South American Mochica Indian relic of protection, Nigel and his colleagues get captured by local guerrillas. It's up to Sydney and ally Jason Clark to save them.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fertile Ground
programme.desc: Sydney reunites with her high school sweetheart to track down a Hawaiian fertility idol in Madagascar.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fertile Ground
programme.desc: Sydney reunites with her high school sweetheart to track down a Hawaiian fertility idol in Madagascar.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Gypsy Jigsaw
programme.desc: Sydney receives a deck of rare Tarot cards from her recently deceased friend. The infamous, previously unmentioned Vulture was after him. Sydney enlists Claudia to help.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Gypsy Jigsaw
programme.desc: Sydney receives a deck of rare Tarot cards from her recently deceased friend. The infamous, previously unmentioned Vulture was after him. Sydney enlists Claudia to help.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Three Rivers to Cross
programme.desc: According to local monks, the Famed Jade Empress is hidden in the valley that will be flooded when the Three Rivers Dam's flood gates have their grand opening.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Three Rivers to Cross
programme.desc: According to local monks, the Famed Jade Empress is hidden in the valley that will be flooded when the Three Rivers Dam's flood gates have their grand opening.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Lost Contact
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and billionaire entrepreneur Rod Thorson parachute into the Myanmar jungle to rescue a relic-hunting team hired by Thorson to locate an ancient sacrificial bowl.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Lost Contact
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and billionaire entrepreneur Rod Thorson parachute into the Myanmar jungle to rescue a relic-hunting team hired by Thorson to locate an ancient sacrificial bowl.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Cross of Voodoo
programme.desc: When two graduate students on the trail of the Haitian Cross of Utu disappear in New Orleans, Sydney and Nigel go down on the bayou to find them.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Cross of Voodoo
programme.desc: When two graduate students on the trail of the Haitian Cross of Utu disappear in New Orleans, Sydney and Nigel go down on the bayou to find them.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are on a trip, so Claudia decides to help Sydney's friend Roger to find Julius Caesar's armor, but relic hunting is not her talent.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are on a trip, so Claudia decides to help Sydney's friend Roger to find Julius Caesar's armor, but relic hunting is not her talent.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Reel Thing
programme.desc: Working as consultants for an archeology adventure film, Sydney and Nigel realize the Pharaoh Amun II's props are genuine, long-thought lost relics. How can they be?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Reel Thing
programme.desc: Working as consultants for an archeology adventure film, Sydney and Nigel realize the Pharaoh Amun II's props are genuine, long-thought lost relics. How can they be?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Out of the Past
programme.desc: Claudia discovers that she was Cleopatra's servant in a past life when she experiences déjà vu while watching a catalog from an Ancient Egyptian relics exposition.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Out of the Past
programme.desc: Claudia discovers that she was Cleopatra's servant in a past life when she experiences déjà vu while watching a catalog from an Ancient Egyptian relics exposition.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Eyes of Toklamanee
programme.desc: Sydney and her student Adam are onto his ancestors' fabled Eyes of Toklamanee, but they are pursued by mysterious gunmen.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Eyes of Toklamanee
programme.desc: Sydney and her student Adam are onto his ancestors' fabled Eyes of Toklamanee, but they are pursued by mysterious gunmen.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Run Sydney Run
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are ambushed in Russia. Two weeks later, Sydney wakes up in the house of a man called Tsarlov, who claims to have saved her.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Run Sydney Run
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are ambushed in Russia. Two weeks later, Sydney wakes up in the house of a man called Tsarlov, who claims to have saved her.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: M.I.A.
programme.desc: Sydney gets kidnapped, but by whom? Nigel, Claudia and Cate will have to go through the list of enemies Sydney has made in the past and deduce which of them is responsible. Cue flashbacks.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: M.I.A.
programme.desc: Sydney gets kidnapped, but by whom? Nigel, Claudia and Cate will have to go through the list of enemies Sydney has made in the past and deduce which of them is responsible. Cue flashbacks.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Don't Go Into the Woods
programme.desc: Sydney's friend phones to inform her that he's discovered information on the Golden Hawk of Maribor, lost since 1711. Sydney and Nigel travel to Lubjanka to meet him, but he's already gone.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Don't Go Into the Woods
programme.desc: Sydney's friend phones to inform her that he's discovered information on the Golden Hawk of Maribor, lost since 1711. Sydney and Nigel travel to Lubjanka to meet him, but he's already gone.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: French Connection
programme.desc: While on a lecture tour with Nigel in Europe, Sydney is contacted by MI5 because she is the only one who can prevent an impending high-level assassination.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: French Connection
programme.desc: While on a lecture tour with Nigel in Europe, Sydney is contacted by MI5 because she is the only one who can prevent an impending high-level assassination.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Midnight Flight
programme.desc: Germania, ca. 400 AD: an artifact called Gunther's Scepter is sealed in a vault. Kleine Burgh, 2001: Sydney and Nigel are hired to find it using a crystal and a stone tablet.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Samlesbury Hall P2
programme.desc: Karl investigates the upper floors of this historic building dating back to 1185, and realises he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the very haunted school room in the large imposing Gressenhall Workhouse. The activity starts even before Karl gets into the building and becomes one of the most impressive investigations to date.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt2
programme.desc: Stuart investigates two buildings, a forge and the cottage. He could not have imagined the activity that unfolded around him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall P1
programme.desc: Stuart investigates the main house and seems to be pulled in different directions from an unexplained energy.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall P2
programme.desc: Karl ventures down into the cellars of this large country house and soon comes under attack from an unseen force.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Karl enters a Masonic Temple alone, seeking the truth behind its eerie reputation. The mysterious world of Freemasonry soon reveals a chilling presence in the shadows.
